description:
2023 Lamborghini Huracan STO, 5.2L V10, RWD, 631bhp, 7 Speed Automatic AED 1,289,000 or AED 20,194 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 8,024 KMs - Lamborghini Warranty Valid Until 20th April 2027 - Full Lamborghini Service Contract - GCC specification - Full PPF - Price includes VAT 
 - Viola Pasifae Exterior - Front Axle Lift - Keyless Start - Carbon Bucket Seats - Multifunctional Steering Wheel - Full Exterior Carbon Pack - Rear Diffuser in Carbon Shiny - Front Bumper in Carbon Shiny - Bezel, Louvers, Upper Fin in Carbon Shiny - Snorkel and Rear Wing in Carbon Shiny - Sports Seats - Matte Carbon Fibre Interior - Brembo Carbon Ceramic Brakes - Apple CarPlay - Reversing Camera - Bluetooth - Electronically Adjustable Wing Mirrors - Navigation - Alcantara Interior Trims - Purple Interior Accents - Selectable Drive Modes - LED Headlights - Roof Mounted Air Intake
